title: Write Tests for a Password Validator
description: Write unit tests for a password validation function using best practices.
instructions:
Given a password validator with these rules:
- Minimum 8 characters
- Must contain at least one uppercase letter
- Must contain at least one lowercase letter
- Must contain at least one digit
- Must contain at least one special character (!@#\$%^&*)

Write comprehensive unit tests that cover:
1. Valid passwords that meet all requirements
2. Invalid passwords for each rule
3. Edge cases (empty string, null, exactly 8 chars, etc.)

Use the test package with group() for organization and expect() with matchers.

hints.text: Use group() to organize tests by rule - one group for length, one for uppercase, etc.
Test the boundary: exactly 8 characters should pass, 7 characters should fail.
Use isTrue and isFalse matchers for boolean assertions instead of equals(true).
